calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-30-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-26-2024 Continued To Sep-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-21-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated October 7, 1996 is admitted to probate. Jewish Family and Children's Services is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with will annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $1,271,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. No appearance is required on that date if a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
